Riyara Trading

Authorised Distributor & Dealer — All Major Cement, Steel & Aggregate Brands Across Tamil Nadu

“Earn Trust with Business”

Tamil Nadu · Est. 2014

About

Riyara Trading is an authorised distributor and dealer for Zuari Cement (Heidelberg Materials), Maha Cement HD+ (My Home Industries), Sagar Cement, Priya Cement, Nagarjuna Cement (NCL Industries), Chettinad Cement, and UltraTech Cement (Aditya Birla Group) across Tamil Nadu. All grades: OPC 43, OPC 53, PPC, Slag. Also: TATA Steel, VSP, SAIL TMT bars (Fe415-Fe550, 8-32mm). Aggregates: Blue Metal, M-Sand, River Sand, Boulders, GSB. Established 2014. Earn Trust with Business.

LinkedIn — Saravanan Udayar (Personal)
Founder, Riyara Trading
Cement · Steel · Aggregates · Tamil Nadu · Since 2014
SU

Saravanan Udayar

Founder, Riyara Trading | Cement, Steel & Aggregates Distribution Across Tamil Nadu | Since 2014

About

Building materials distribution is what I do. Since 2014, Riyara Trading has been the authorised distribution channel for all major cement brands in Tamil Nadu. We distribute Zuari, Maha, Sagar, Priya, Nagarjuna, Chettinad, and UltraTech cement. Plus TATA, VSP, SAIL TMT steel. Plus aggregates. Our approach: the brands are the heroes. We’re the reliable channel. One call. One account manager. Proper documentation. Consistent pricing. Zero-tolerance timing. Even on Sundays. That’s what 11 years of distribution teaches you.

This creates a checkerboard effect when someone visits the profile — brand colours + Riyara red alternating. Visually striking and immediately communicates ‘multi-brand distributor.’

Cement manufacturers make excellent products. That’s their expertise. Our expertise is different. We make sure that product reaches your project — right brand, right grade, right quantity, right time. Post 5 — LinkedIn (Company) Apr 7 Mon · Brand Collab
LinkedIn Chettinad Cement ALL GRADES ALWAYS

Riyara Trading

Building Materials

Chettinad Cement has been building South India since 1962. Three generations of manufacturing leadership. Riyara doesn’t just carry Chettinad. We stock every Chettinad grade — OPC 43, OPC 53, PPC. Not just the popular ones. All of them. Always. Because the project that needs Chettinad PPC at 6 AM shouldn’t hear “we only have OPC 53 right now.” Bulk and packed. Across Tamil Nadu. Riyara Trading — authorised distributor and dealer for Chettinad Cement across Tamil Nadu. #ChettinadCement #ChettinadCementDealer #ChettinadCementDistributor #ChettinadCementTamilNadu #CementDealer #CementDistributor #RiyaraTrading #TamilNadu #AuthorisedDistributor

LinkedIn Riyara CONSISTENT PRICING

Riyara Trading

Building Materials

In this industry, last-minute price changes are common. “Rates went up since yesterday.” “There’s a loading charge we didn’t mention.” At Riyara: what’s quoted is what’s billed. Period. Consistent pricing. No surprises. No renegotiation after dispatch. 11 years of this. It’s why clients stay. #RiyaraTrading #ConsistentPricing #NoPriceSurprises #CementDealer #TamilNadu

Post 12 — LinkedIn (Saravanan) Apr 17 Thu · Business Insight
LI·Saravanan Riyara AUTHORISED NOT GREY
SU

Saravanan Udayar

Founder

In Tamil Nadu’s cement market, not every dealer is authorised by the manufacturer. Grey market cement exists. It’s cheaper. But there’s no traceability. No guarantee on sourcing. No manufacturer backing if something goes wrong. Riyara is an authorised agent for every brand we carry. That means: → Direct sourcing from the manufacturer → Full documentation trail → Manufacturer-backed quality assurance It costs us more to operate this way. But your project deserves certainty, not savings on paper. #AuthorisedDistributor #QualityAssurance #CementIndustry\n\nGrey market cement exists. It’s cheaper. But there’s no traceability. No guarantee on sourcing. No manufacturer backing if something goes wrong.\n\nRiyara is an authorised agent for every brand we carry. That means:\n→ Direct sourcing from the manufacturer\n→ Full documentation trail\n→ Manufacturer-backed quality assurance\n\nIt costs us more to operate this way. But your project deserves certainty, not savings on paper.\n\n#AuthorisedDistributor #QualityAssurance #CementIndustry

Post 17 — LinkedIn (Saravanan) Apr 24 Thu · Business Insight
LI·Saravanan Riyara PROPER DOCUMENTATION
SU

Saravanan Udayar

Founder

You’d be surprised how many cement deliveries happen without proper documentation. “We’ll send the invoice later.” “The weighbridge was closed.” “Just check the quantity at site.” At Riyara, every delivery comes with: → GST invoice → Weighbridge slip → Delivery challan Every time. No exceptions. Because your accounts team and audit trail deserve the same reliability as your cement supply. #Documentation #Compliance #CementDistribution\n\n“We’ll send the invoice later.”\n“The weighbridge was closed.”\n“Just check the quantity at site.”\n\nAt Riyara, every delivery comes with:\n→ GST invoice\n→ Weighbridge slip\n→ Delivery challan\n\nEvery time. No exceptions. Because your accounts team and audit trail deserve the same reliability as your cement supply.\n\n#Documentation #Compliance #CementDistribution

LI·Saravanan Riyara 11 YEARS ZERO GAPS

Saravanan Udayar

Founder

Riyara started in 2014. 2015: delivered. 2016: delivered. 2017: delivered. 2018: delivered. 2019: delivered. 2020: delivered (yes, even during COVID). 2021: delivered. 2022: delivered. 2023: delivered. 2024: delivered. 2025: delivered. 11 years. Continuously. Without a gap. Without a pause. In a market where cement dealers appear and disappear, that’s not just a track record. Post 5 — LinkedIn (Company) May 12 Mon · Brand Collab
LinkedIn TATA Steel

Riyara Trading

Building Materials

When an engineer writes “TATA Fe500” on the spec sheet, they’re choosing consistency. Riyara distributes TATA TMT bars across Tamil Nadu: Fe415 · Fe500 · Fe550. 8mm to 32mm. Mill test certificates with every delivery. Proper GST documentation. No substitutions. Post 3 — LinkedIn (Saravanan) Jun 4 Wed · Education
LI·Saravanan Riyara ALL GRADES + GRADE SELECTION
SU

Saravanan Udayar

Founder

OPC 43: Everyday cement. Residential. Plastering. OPC 53: High-strength. Flyovers. Bridges. RMC. PPC: Durability. Moisture resistance. Coastal structures. Slag: Specialist. Marine. Chemical resistance. No grade is “better.” Each serves a purpose. The skill is matching grade to structure. All four manufactured by the brands we distribute. All four always in stock at Riyara. #CementGrades #OPC43 #OPC53 #PPC #Construction\nOPC 53: High-strength. Flyovers. Bridges. RMC.\nPPC: Durability. Moisture resistance. Coastal structures.\nSlag: Specialist. Marine. Chemical resistance.\n\nNo grade is “better.” Each serves a purpose. The skill is matching grade to structure.\n\nAll four manufactured by the brands we distribute. All four always in stock at Riyara.\n\n#CementGrades #OPC43 #OPC53 #PPC #Construction

Post 11 — LinkedIn (Saravanan) Jun 18 Wed · Education
LI·Saravanan Riyara ZERO TOLERANCE
SU

Saravanan Udayar

Founder

0-3 months from manufacture: Full strength. 3-6 months: Slight reduction. 6+ months: Significant degradation. Retest. The manufacturers produce quality cement. Our job is to deliver it while it’s at its best. That’s why timing matters. That’s why zero tolerance isn’t just about convenience — it’s about quality. #CementQuality #ShelfLife #Construction\n3-6 months: Slight reduction.\n6+ months: Significant degradation. Retest.\n\nThe manufacturers produce quality cement. Our job is to deliver it while it’s at its best. That’s why timing matters. That’s why zero tolerance isn’t just about convenience — it’s about quality.\n\n#CementQuality #ShelfLife #Construction

Saravanan Udayar

Founder

1. People search for cement brands, not distributors. Showing up alongside them made Riyara visible. 2. The “small” USPs mattered most. Weekend delivery. Proper documentation. Consistent pricing.
